> RSA 2026 · Moscone Center · March 23-26

---

## Category
**Cluster:** OT / ICS / IoT Security

---

## Product Brief
1. Dragos provides industrial cybersecurity solutions for operational technology (OT) environments.
2. Their core technology is the Dragos Platform, designed to detect and respond to threats in industrial control systems (ICS).
3. They differentiate through deep OT/ICS threat intelligence and expertise in safeguarding critical infrastructure.

---

## RSA 2026 Highlights
- Robert M. Lee, CEO & Co-founder, is presenting multiple sessions, including a keynote panel on new attack techniques and a session on securing critical infrastructure.
- Dragos is hosting an OT Cyber Social happy hour with SANS ICS and offering demos of the Dragos Platform at their booth.

---

## Top Questions to Ask
- [ ] What are the latest threats observed in the OT/ICS landscape, and how does the Dragos Platform address them?
- [ ] How does Dragos integrate with existing IT security infrastructure to provide a unified view of cyber risk?
- [ ] Can you elaborate on your approach to safeguarding critical infrastructure, particularly in light of emerging AI-powered threats?
